subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Make Thy loved ones victorious, make them intimate companions in servitude unto Thee, and illumine their hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار یارانرا کامکار کن و بعبودیّتت همدم و دمساز فرما قلوب را نورانی فرما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @East and West; communication between East and West
